title: UnderscoreJS Cheat Sheet
description: Quick reference for common UnderscoreJS functions and patterns.

commands.description: Iterate over a list of elements, yielding each in turn to an iteratee function.
commands.scenario: Iterate over a list of elements, yielding each in turn to an iteratee function.

commands.description: Return a new array of values by mapping each value in list through a transformation function.
commands.scenario: Return a new array of values by mapping each value in list through a transformation function.

commands.description: Reduce a list of values down to a single value by iteratively combining each value.
commands.scenario: Reduce a list of values down to a single value by iteratively combining each value.

commands.description: Return the first element of an array. Passing n will return the first n elements.
commands.scenario: Return the first element of an array. Passing n will return the first n elements.

commands.description: Return the rest of the elements in an array. Pass an index to return the values from that index onward.
commands.scenario: Return the rest of the elements in an array. Pass an index to return the values from that index onward.

commands.description: Flatten a nested array (the nesting can be to any depth).
commands.scenario: Flatten a nested array (the nesting can be to any depth).

commands.description: Retrieve all the names of the object's own enumerable properties.
commands.scenario: Retrieve all the names of the object's own enumerable properties.

commands.description: Return a copy of the object, filtered to only have values for the whitelisted keys.
commands.scenario: Return a copy of the object, filtered to only have values for the whitelisted keys.

commands.description: Return a copy of the object, filtered to omit the blacklisted keys.
commands.scenario: Return a copy of the object, filtered to omit the blacklisted keys.

commands.description: Return a function that will only be executed after being called n times.
commands.scenario: Return a function that will only be executed after being called n times.

commands.description: Bind a function to an object, meaning that whenever the function is called, the value of this will be the object.
commands.scenario: Bind a function to an object, meaning that whenever the function is called, the value of this will be the object.

commands.description: Return a function that can be called at most one time. Subsequent calls will return the result of the first call.
commands.scenario: Return a function that can be called at most one time. Subsequent calls will return the result of the first call.
